summary: Reframed the opening around the parcel and snow-dim dormitory so the chapter enters from a different structural angle while linking more directly to the previous chapter's late-night scene. The ending already handed off cleanly to chapter 11's ward-strain follow-through, so it was left intact.
edits: Shifted the opening from a wake-up-by-sound construction to a parcel-and-window visual anchor.
Added a brief note that Gavin had only been asleep a few hours to preserve continuity from the previous chapter's late-night translation scene.
